title: Repeated messages from same user → same tenant reused
evidence: All 6 TC-002 assertions pass (102/102 total e2e tests): - ✓ TC-002: tenant is ACTIVE before second message - ✓ TC-002: relay returns HTTP 200 immediately for second message - ✓ TC-002: no new tenant row created — exactly 1 tenant for this principal - ✓ TC-002: second message_queue row added and delivered (Ev_TC002_002, status=DELIVERED) - ✓ TC-002: tenant last_activity_at updated after second message - ✓ TC-002: audit log contains MESSAGE_DELIVERED twice (once per message)
